holdings.infoBox: FRTY is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Trsy Oblig Cash Mgmt Cl Ins stock at 8.06%, Western Digital at 5.12%, Nebius Group at 4.26%, Twist Bioscience at 4.05%, and Vertiv Holdings Co at 3.80%.

overview.description: The Alger Mid Cap 40 ETF (FRTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed  ETF that provides exposure to US mid-cap companies with growth characteristics. Holdings are selected based on proprietary fundamental research, seeking long-term capital appreciation through stock picking. FRTY was launched on Feb 26, 2021 and is issued by Alger.
